ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin airport */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination airport */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Scheduled flight time */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the aircraft model */,
  "std" TEXT /* Scheduled takeoff time */,
  "atd" TEXT /* Actual takeoff time */,
  "sta" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "ata" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the airport */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number at the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES aircraft_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aircraft model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft manufacturer */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "cruise_speed" REAL /* Cruise speed of the aircraft */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight route */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin airport */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination airport */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the airports */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Flight time between the airports */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the route information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "std" TEXT /* Scheduled takeoff time */,
  "sta" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the airport */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number at the airport */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight status */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time when the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_status_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_time" TEXT /* Time when the delay occurred */,
  "delay_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the delay information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_cancellations" (
  "cancel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight cancellation */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "cancel_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation */,
  "cancel_time" TEXT /* Time when the cancellation occurred */,
  "cancel_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the cancellation in minutes */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who updated the cancellation information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_cancellations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., passenger, pilot, airport staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
